ocr.text: In the Q1 2024 report for Hyundai Motor, the Average Transaction Prices by Vehicle Segment reveal that Compact Cars have an
Average Price of CHF22,500 with a Change of 2.5%, SUVs show an Average Price of CHF35,000 reflecting a Change of 4.0%,
and Luxury Vehicles are priced at CHF60,000 with a Change of 3.5%. Overall, the Average Price across All Segments stands at
CHF30,000 with a Change of 3.0%, while Electric Vehicles average CHF45,000 with a Change of 5.0%.
VehicleSegment  AveragePrice  Change(%)
CompactCars  CHF22,500  2.5
SUVs  CHF35,000  4.0
LuxuryVehicles  CHF60,000  3.5  TotalVehicles
AllSegments  CHF30,000  3.0  ElectricVehicles  CHF45,000  5.0
MarketShare  15%  NetProfitMargin  7.5%  ReturnonAssets  5.0%
DebtRatio  40%  InventoryTurnover  6.5  GrossMargin  18%
Historical data indicates an Average Price of CHF28,000 in 2021, CHF29,000 in 2022, CHF30,000 in 2023, and CHF31,000 in
2024. Market Share is at 15%, Net Profit Margin at 7.5%, Return on Assets at 5.0%, Debt Ratio at 40%, Inventory Turnover at
6.5, and Gross Margin at 18%.

In Table 2 covering Emission Compliance Costs, Year to Date figures for Q1 2024 show Total Revenue of CHF200M, Net
Income of CHF150M, CAPEX of CHF30M, Operating Expenses of CHF50M, Cost of Goods Sold at CHF20M, and
Compliance Costs totaling CHF10M with Direct Costs of CHF5M and Indirect Costs of CHF90M. Additionally, Q1 2023
figures report Total Revenue of CHF250M, Net Income of CHF160M, CAPEX of CHF35M, Operating Expenses of CHF55M,
Cost of Goods Sold at CHF25M, and Compliance Costs of CHF12M with Direct Costs of CHF6M and Indirect Costs of
CHF95M.
